name: TTN downlinks — click an inject to queue a command (applied on the node's NEXT wake)
info:
Publishes a downlink to TTN over the same MQTT broker as the uplink flow.
The node reads it in the RX window after its next uplink and acts on it.

Commands (see include/config.h):
  01 <min>  set deep-sleep interval, minutes 1..255  (0x01)
  02        reboot the node                          (0x02)

base64 payloads used below:
  AQU=  = 01 05  -> 5 min
  AR4=  = 01 1E  -> 30 min
  Ag==  = 02     -> reboot

EDIT the 'build TTN downlink' function: set APP (and confirm DEV).

name: build TTN downlink
